'''wadhungu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:avenue|avenue]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-dh-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:avenue|avenue]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| wadhungu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wædhingith|wædhingith]] || [[word:wædhingij|wædhingij]] || [[word:wædhingish|wædhingish]] || [[word:wædhingi|wædhingi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wadhudhunguth|wadhudhunguth]] || [[word:wadhudhunguj|wadhudhunguj]] || [[word:wadhudhungush|wadhudhungush]] || [[word:wadhudhungu|wadhudhungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wadhunguth|wadhunguth]] || [[word:wadhunguj|wadhunguj]] || [[word:wadhungush|wadhungush]] || [[word:wadhungu|wadhungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wadhufnguth|wadhufnguth]] || [[word:wadhufnguj|wadhufnguj]] || [[word:wadhufngush|wadhufngush]] || [[word:wadhufnguf|wadhufnguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wadhunguthu|wadhunguthu]] || [[word:wadhunguju|wadhunguju]] || [[word:wadhungushu|wadhungushu]] || [[word:wadhunguku|wadhunguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wadhunguth|wadhunguth]] || [[word:wadhunguj|wadhunguj]] || [[word:wadhungush|wadhungush]] || [[word:wadhungu|wadhungu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wadhunguthul|wadhunguthul]] || [[word:wadhungujul|wadhungujul]] || [[word:wadhungushul|wadhungushul]] || [[word:wadhungukul|wadhungukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wadhunguthuthu|wadhunguthuthu]] || [[word:wadhungujuju|wadhungujuju]] || [[word:wadhungushushu|wadhungushushu]] || [[word:wadhunguku|wadhunguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wadhunguthun|wadhunguthun]] || [[word:wadhungujun|wadhungujun]] || [[word:wadhungushun|wadhungushun]] || [[word:wadhungukun|wadhungukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wadhunguthuoro|wadhunguthuoro]] || [[word:wadhungujuoro|wadhungujuoro]] || [[word:wadhungushuoro|wadhungushuoro]] || [[word:wadhungukuoro|wadhungukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
